claim_support.reason: Severe unsupported claim regarding Equinix's market share in Hong Kong. Business & Competitive Analysis Paragraph 2 states Equinix holds a '23.8% revenue share', but the cited evidence chunk [95c7f19f-8b2c-4201-8769-b2003e6d74d6] only supports market size growth figures ($1.41B to $2.52B) and does not contain the 23.8% figure or attribute it to Equinix in the visible text. This is a material numerical claim without evidentiary support.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical inconsistency in Net Income growth rate. Recent Developments Paragraph 1 claims Net Income climbed '7.29% YoY to $368 million'. The authoritative cited calculation object [e3836a97-c9b0-42fa-87e2-80a60ca519df] lists Q2 2024 Net Income as $301 million and Q2 2025 as $368 million, which implies a growth rate of ~22.3%, not 7.29%. The calculation object itself contains an internal mathematical error (301M to 368M is not 7.29%), and the report propagates this incorrect growth rate.

citation_precision.reason: Structured citation IDs are correctly listed for each paragraph. However, the content of some cited chunks (e.g., market share evidence) does not visibly support the specific claims made, which impacts precision indirectly. Most other citations align well with the text.

temporal_validity.reason: All events and data points are temporally valid relative to the As-Of date of 2025-08-06. Q2 2025 earnings (July 31, 2025) and F5 partnership (August 5, 2025) are prior to the report date. No post-as-of claims detected.

consistency.reason: The report text is internally consistent regarding revenue, margins, and debt figures across sections. The numerical inconsistency identified in Net Income growth exists within the evidence/calc object itself, but the report text does not contradict itself (it does not state the Q2 2024 base number).
